Variables.Name: Rate
Variables.Description: The rate at which to spawn particles.

Variables.Name: RateScale
Variables.Description: The scalar to apply to the rate.

Variables.Name: ParticleBurstMethod
Variables.Description: The method to utilize when burst-emitting particles.

Variables.Name: BurstScale
Variables.Description: Scale all burst entries by this amount.

Variables.Name: bApplyGlobalSpawnRateScale
Variables.Description: If true, the SpawnRate will be scaled by the global CVar r.EmitterSpawnRateScale
